violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Counter top in Market Grille Express has cracking and breakage in surface creating voides that are difficult to clean. The surface installed screws holding the countertop together are also difficult to clean.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Deep fryer has heavy grease and debris build up around oil filler connections and in between fryer and cooler.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors directly below deep fryer have accessive oil and grease build-up.
POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of vegetables breads and other food items was noted not being properly dated for disposition.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service to-go containers noted being stored on the floor near the 3 compartment sink area.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Counter top in Market Grille Express has cracking in surface creating voides that are difficult to clean.
